electric-cobalt.$description: Electric Cobalt — Hero panels, filled buttons, active nav indicators, link accents — the primary brand signal, used as a full-bleed surface rather than a small button color to dominate the page

indigo-action.$description: Indigo Action — Primary filled action buttons and their borders — a slightly lighter, more violet-shifted blue for interactive surfaces that need to feel pressed and clickable

deep-indigo.$description: Deep Indigo — Primary text, headings, and dark button borders — replaces pure black with a warm navy that reads as authoritative without the harshness of #000

sky-tint.$description: Sky Tint — Hover states, subtle outlined button borders, secondary navigation accents — a desaturated companion to Electric Cobalt for non-dominant blue moments

glacial-wash.$description: Glacial Wash — Pale blue tinted backgrounds, soft highlight washes, tag fills, and light section dividers — bridges the white canvas to the blue brand without harsh contrast

parchment.$description: Parchment — Page background canvas — a warm near-white that softens the starkness of pure white and reduces eye strain across long scrolling pages

pure-white.$description: Pure White — Card surfaces, input fields, button text, elevated panels — the brightest surface layer sitting atop Parchment

mist.$description: Mist — Hairline borders, input outlines, subtle dividers between sections — the quietest structural line color

silver.$description: Silver — Secondary surface fills, placeholder backgrounds, disabled states

pewter.$description: Pewter — Shadow base color and muted icon tints

fog.$description: Fog — Muted body text, secondary metadata, inactive form labels

steel.$description: Steel — Input placeholder text, tertiary captions, subtle icon strokes

slate.$description: Slate — Link text in their resting state, secondary body copy

graphite.$description: Graphite — Mid-tier body text, descriptions, helper copy that needs to recede behind headings

charcoal.$description: Charcoal — Dark section borders, footer dividers

obsidian.$description: Obsidian — Dark footer background, dark section panels, card borders on light surfaces — the system's dark surface color, used as a deliberate band rather than scattered

cobalt-radial.$description: Cobalt Radial — Radial gradient highlight accent — used sparingly as a luminous spot inside blue panels to create depth

khteka.$description: Primary interface and headline typeface — a geometric humanist sans with slightly compressed proportions and a tech-friendly neutrality. Used across all contexts (heading, body, button, nav, card, badge, icon, input) at every measured size. The 36px display weight 700 is the signature headline voice; 16px weight 400 is the comfortable reading body.

roboto.$description: Secondary system font — appears in modals, cookie banners, and any overlay/dialog content. Its presence suggests system-stack fallbacks for third-party injected UI rather than a deliberate secondary brand choice.

khteka-mono.$description: Monospaced companion for code snippets, wallet addresses, transaction hashes, and any alphanumeric string that must align character-by-character in card contexts

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Page background, the warm off-white that defines the overall lightness

card.$description: Surface level 1: Product cards, input fields, elevated content blocks sitting on the canvas

recessed.$description: Surface level 2: Inset surfaces, subtle grouping backgrounds, disabled state fills

brand-panel.$description: Surface level 3: Full-bleed hero bands, feature panels, and any surface where the brand color becomes the background

dark-band.$description: Surface level 4: Footer and inverted dark sections, used as a terminating band at page bottom
